function resolve(bytes32 didHash) external view returns (address controller, bytes32 documentHash, uint256 created, uint256 updated, bool active)
function isActive(bytes32 didHash) external view returns (bool)
function updateDocument(bytes32 didHash, bytes32 newDocumentHash) external
function bindBiometric(bytes32 didHash, bytes32 biometricHash) external
function biometricToDID(bytes32 biometricHash) external view returns (bytes32)
function controllerOf(bytes32 didHash) external view returns (address)
function changeController(bytes32 didHash, address newController) external
function getDIDsByController(address controller) external view returns (bytes32[] memory)
event DIDCreated(bytes32 indexed didHash, address indexed controller, bytes32 documentHash)
event DIDUpdated(bytes32 indexed didHash, bytes32 newDocumentHash)
event BiometricBound(bytes32 indexed didHash, bytes32 biometricHash)
event ControllerChanged(bytes32 indexed didHash, address indexed newController)
